scenarios.name: Audit an 8-field B2B SaaS trial signup at 23% completion
scenarios.rationale: Treatment cuts the form to email/password/full-name with company and role deferred to post-login onboarding, adds Google and Microsoft SSO prominently, and structures findings as Issue/Impact/Fix/Priority quick wins per the skill; baseline gives vague 'reduce fields and add SSO' advice without the deferral rationale, prioritization format, or field-level drop-off measurement.

scenarios.name: Design a pre-launch consumer-app waitlist signup
scenarios.rationale: Treatment specifies email-only single field, no password, position number + referral link post-submit, mobile keyboard type and autofill, plus skipping email verification at waitlist stage — all from the skill's example; baseline proposes a standard email+name form with verification and no referral loop.
